testcase.name: Smokevana ERP List Return Automation › Scenario Three: Create List Return for existing invoice
testcase.system-out:
Point 1-3: Launching browser and logging in... Filling username: admin... Filling password... Clicking Sign in... Closed Application Tour modal. Point 4-5: Navigating to List Sell Return(CN) via Sidebar... Point 6: Wait for List Return index page to load... List Return index page loaded. Point 7: Clicking Add button... Return creation form loaded. Point 8: Selecting the first available invoice from the dropdown... Invoice selected and form populated. Point 9-11: Filling return quantity for the first item... Point 12: Applying return discount... Point 13: Taking intermediate screenshot... Point 14: Submitting return... Point 15: Verifying success... Scenario 3: Completed successfully up to Step 15.
[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\Listreturn-Smokevana-ERP-L-5e4ce-Return-for-existing-invoice-chromium\test-finished-1.png]]

[[ATTACHMENT|test-results\Listreturn-Smokevana-ERP-L-5e4ce-Return-for-existing-invoice-chromium\test-finished-2.png]]
